div.h1: Open-Addressed Hash Table: Contiguous Memory Layout

p.strong: Technical Specification: Cache-Aligned SIMD-Friendly Array-of-Structs vs Struct-of-Arrays

ol.li: SIMD Compare (AVX): 1 cycle Effective throughput: 8 keys / 5 cycles

ul.li: SIMD: Loadable into YMM (256b) or ZMM (512b)

div.p: Hardware Prefetcher Target Prefetcher identifies strided access patterns (i+1) and populates L2/L1 speculatively.

ul.li: Each ->next is a cold cache miss.
Single fetch fills L1 for 8+ lookups.
